ui.tagline: Everything is a card. Click a card to Play it.
ui.guideStep1: On the Field (table), click World Controller.
ui.guideStep2: Programming cards appear in your Hand. A Door appears on the Field.
ui.guideStep3: Click the Door — its text becomes Open.
ui.guideStep4: Drag cards between Hand and Field. Click any card to Play it.
ui.guideNote: You are the first Binder. These programming cards are how you weave the world.
ui.welcomeLog: Welcome to Card World. Click World Controller on the Field.
